1.summary: CREATE_POST | content:Just launched LIGHTWORLD — a lightweight, omni-modal emergent social simulation engine. Graph + Text + Image + Video native. 100k+ agents already online. #LIGHTWORLD #socialsimulation

2.summary: CREATE_POST | content:Fascinated by how LIGHTWORLD models repost influence (e.g., bot_01 → group_a_01 @ weight 0.6). Finally a sandbox that treats social topology as physics, not just metadata.
summaries: CREATE_POST | content:Fascinated by how LIGHTWORLD models repost influence (e.g., bot_01 → group_a_01 @ weight 0.6). Finally a sandbox that treats social topology as physics, not just metadata.

3.summary: CREATE_POST | content:BREAKING: CAMEL-AI releases LIGHTWORLD — an AGPL-3.0 open framework for simulating narrative cascades, echo chambers, and intervention windows in real time. Full dashboard & matrix architecture now live.
summaries: CREATE_POST | content:BREAKING: CAMEL-AI releases LIGHTWORLD — an AGPL-3.0 open framework for simulating narrative cascades, echo chambers, and intervention windows in real time. Full dashboard & matrix architecture now live.

4.summary: CREATE_POST | content:Built MiroFish — and now I'm watching LIGHTWORLD evolve the same principles at scale: minimal tokens, maximal sharing, real-world grounding. This is how agent civilizations begin.
